text: In this sterile, luminous corridor, I sense a threshold between the ordinary and the meaningful. Stepping closer to the exhibit, I am enveloped by the concept of responsive transformation—R+D, a laboratory of thought. The words displayed echo my own vulnerability: exposed, unsure, longing for understanding. I feel a kinship with this space, as if it invites me to reflect honestly on how perception shapes our being and how we yearn for recognition and connection amidst evolving technology.
